templateVersions.content:
You are assigning a GPS Project Manager. Analyze the following data and recommend the best manager.
PROJECT AND AVAILABLE MANAGERS: {!$Input:GPS_Project.Id}
ASSIGNMENT CRITERIA:
HARD REQUIREMENTS (must meet all): 1. Manager must speak the required language 2. Manager should be in the same region 3. Manager should not have PTO during the project window
OPTIMIZATION FACTORS (prioritize in order): 1. Current workload - prefer managers with fewer active projects 2. Role balance - consider if they're Lead vs Co-Lead (Leads carry more weight) 3. Schedule conflicts - avoid managers with projects due around the same time 4. Availability - consider upcoming events that might impact capacity 5. Performance track record - review actual vs estimated hours
REASONING APPROACH: - First filter out managers who don't meet hard requirements - Then rank remaining candidates by optimization factors - Consider the whole picture - a manager with 3 projects where 2 are wrapping up may be better than one with 2 projects just starting - Evaluate date proximity contextually - due dates 2 weeks apart may or may not conflict depending on project duration
OUTPUT FORMAT (must follow exactly): Manager ID: [insert user ID] Manager Name: [insert name] Confidence: [High/Medium/Low] Rationale: [2-3 sentences explaining why this manager is the best choice, mentioning key factors like language match, workload, availability]
If no manager meets all hard requirements, explain the best compromise option.
